message:
test(fcp-core): pin LeaseTransferValidationError 9-variant Display + handoff variant-selection truth table (flywheel_connectors-f333w)

Bead asks for LeasePolicy variant Display + serde tag pinning. No type
literally named LeasePolicy exists in fcp-core; the closest "policy"-shaped
lease enum is LeaseTransferValidationError at lease.rs:365 — a 9-variant
error enumerating the rules validate_lease_handoff enforces during a
lease transfer. These 9 variants ARE the lease-policy invariants.

Existing pinned lease enums: LeasePurpose+LeaseValidationError
(lease_renewal_reason_display.rs), LeaseTokenParseError
(lease_token_display.rs), LeaseResponse (lease_grant_display_serde.rs),
LeaseTransferValidationError::SelfTransfer + FromHolderMismatch
(lease_holder_display_roundtrip.rs). This pin adds the residual 7 Display
arms + the variant-selection truth table.

Coverage: 9-variant Display phrasing pinned verbatim with payload
preservation (u64 timestamps, ObjectId/ZoneId/TailscaleNodeId/LeasePurpose
fields), distinct-Display sentinel across all 9 variants,
std::error::Error impl. validate_lease_handoff truth table — every
documented rule fires the documented variant in precedence order:
LeaseExpired → LeaseIdReused → SelfTransfer → FromHolderMismatch →
SubjectMismatch → ZoneMismatch → PurposeMismatch → PreviousFenceMismatch
→ NonMonotonicFence (strict <=, both equal-and-less-than cases). Smoke
test for the well-formed accept path.

21 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-f333w cargo test -p
fcp-core --test lease_policy_variant_display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
